mapper.sql: select er.enroll_id, er.enroll_no, er.contest_id, c.contest_name, c.partner_id, er.participant_id, p.name as participant_name, p.guardian_name, p.guardian_mobile, p.school, er.template_id, er.template_version, er.form_snapshot_json, er.material_status, er.audit_status, er.audit_remark, er.supplement_remark, er.submit_time, er.update_time, er.remark from jst_enroll_record er left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = er.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = er.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select enroll_id, enroll_no, contest_id, user_id, participant_id, channel_id, enroll_source, template_id, template_version, form_snapshot_json, order_id, material_status, audit_status, audit_remark, supplement_remark, submit_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from jst_enroll_record where enroll_id = #{enrollId} and del_flag = '0'

select enroll_id, enroll_no, contest_id, user_id, participant_id, channel_id, enroll_source, template_id, template_version, form_snapshot_json, order_id, material_status, audit_status, audit_remark, supplement_remark, submit_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from jst_enroll_record where contest_id = #{contestId} and participant_id = #{participantId} and user_id = #{userId} and material_status = 'draft' and del_flag = '0' order by update_time desc, enroll_id desc limit 1

select count(distinct p.participant_id) from jst_participant p left join jst_participant_user_map m on m.participant_id = p.participant_id and m.status = 'active' and m.del_flag = '0' where p.participant_id = #{participantId} and p.del_flag = '0' and (p.user_id = #{userId} or p.claimed_user_id = #{userId} or m.user_id = #{userId})

select p.participant_id from jst_participant p where p.guardian_mobile = #{phone} and p.del_flag = '0' order by case when #{name} is not null and #{name} != '' and p.name = #{name} then 0 else 1 end, p.participant_id asc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into jst_participant ( participant_type, name, gender, school, class_name, guardian_mobile, guardian_name, claim_status, visible_scope, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{participantType}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{school}, #{className}, #{guardianMobile}, #{guardianName}, #{claimStatus}, #{visibleScope}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, '0' )
mapper.update: update jst_enroll_record set template_id = #{templateId}, template_version = #{templateVersion}, form_snapshot_json = #{formSnapshotJson}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, submit_time = #{submitTime}, supplement_remark = #{supplementRemark}, remark = null, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where enroll_id = #{enrollId} and del_flag = '0'
